mapper.select: SELECT cq.id, cq.quest_id, ql.quest_type, cq.end_date FROM userdb.character_quest cq INNER JOIN gamedb.quest_list ql ON ql.id = cq.quest_id WHERE cq.character_id = #{characterId} AND cq.end_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY cq.quest_id, cq.end_date DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM userdb.character_quest WHERE quest_id = #{questId} AND character_id = #{characterId}
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM gamedb.quest_list WHERE id = #{questId}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_quest SET end_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, counter = counter + 1 WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND quest_id = #{questId}
mapper.select: SELECT quest_id FROM userdb.character_quest WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND end_date IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userdb.character_quest WHERE quest_id = #{questId} AND end_date IS NOT NULL AND account_name = #{accountName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userdb.character_quest (quest_id, quest_reward_id, character_id, account_name, character_name, start_date, end_date, monster_count, item_count, time_left, counter) VALUES (#{questId}, #{questRewardId}, #{characterId}, #{accountName}, #{characterName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '', '', 0, 1)

INSERT INTO userdb.character_quest (quest_id, quest_reward_id, character_id, account_name, character_name, start_date, end_date, monster_count, item_count, time_left, counter) VALUES (#{questId}, #{questRewardId}, #{characterId}, #{accountName}, #{characterName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL, #{monsterCount}, #{itemCount}, #{timeLeft}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_quest SET start_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, end_date = NULL, time_left = #{timeLeft}, monster_count = #{monsterCount}, item_count = #{itemCount} WHERE character_id = #{characterId} AND quest_id = #{questId}
UPDATE userdb.character_quest SET quest_id = #{newQuestId} WHERE character_name = #{characterName} AND quest_id = #{oldQuestId}
mapper.select: SELECT time_left, start_date FROM userdb.character_quest WHERE quest_id = #{questId} AND character_id = #{characterId}
SELECT monster_count, item_count FROM userdb.character_quest WHERE quest_id = #{questId} AND character_id = #{characterId}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_quest SET character_name = #{newName} WHERE character_name = #{oldName}
